title: Pain Point
description: A single structured pain-point / use-case entry. Modeled after ideabrowser.com, painonsocial.com, Santifer repair-lifecycle, and a16z vertical-AI framing.

title.description: Short descriptive title of the pain

workflow_family.description: Which of the 7 workflow families this pain maps to (plus 'full_lifecycle' for Santifer-style bundles)

pain_severity.description: How acute the pain is (1=mild, 10=losing money / compliance risk)

tedium_score.description: How boring/repetitive the task is (10=pure data entry, prime AI replacement)

tam_firms.description: Estimated number of target firms (null if unknown)

tam_labor_spend_usd.description: Annual labor spend in USD across the category (null if unknown)

tam_direction.description: Is the TAM expanding or shrinking?

current_wtp_usd_month.description: What target persona pays today for nearest incumbent, per seat or per firm per month (USD)

incumbent_tools.description: Existing SaaS / tools serving this pain

incumbent_gap.description: Why incumbents fail (rigid, expensive, no AI, fragmented, etc.)

santifer_pattern.description: One-line solution architecture: Airtable/SSOT + automation + AI agent + channels

evidence_count.description: How many independent sources (Reddit threads, G2 reviews, forum posts) validate this pain

sources.description: URLs validating the pain (Reddit, forums, blog posts, case studies)

verbatim_quotes.description: Verbatim user complaints pulled from public Reddit/forum/review threads — real words from the persona, not paraphrase

quote.description: Verbatim text. Quoted as written; ellipses for elisions.

source_url.description: Direct URL to the thread / review / post

source_label.description: Human-readable source, e.g. 'r/smallbusiness', 'G2 review', 'Rossmann Group forum'

author_handle.description: Public handle of the author as displayed (Reddit username, reviewer name). Omit if anonymous.

date.description: Post date YYYY-MM or YYYY-MM-DD if known

reference_build.description: URL of existing real-world build of this pattern, if any

why_now.description: What changed recently that makes this buildable (LLM cost, WhatsApp API, regulation, etc.)

opportunity_score.description: Composite score: severity * tedium * TAM direction * WTP, normalized 0-100
